case_title: ACCORD BUSINESS FUNDING WEST, LLC VS. TOKYO KATANA-YA LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCORD BUSINESS FUNDING WEST, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TOKYO KATANA-YA LLC BUCAGO, ROLANDO BUCSIT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCORD BUSINESS FUNDING WEST, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOKYO KATANA-YA LLC BUCAGO, ROLANDO BUCSIT $34,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $791.78 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,226.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100069592) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCORD BUSINESS FUNDING WEST, LLC SERVED DEC-12-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE DEC-12-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT BUCAGO, ROLANDO BUCSIT PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-22-2019 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
